zh: 林辰，下季度的拍摄方案你看了没有？
en: Lin Chen, have you seen the shoot plan for next quarter?

zh: 看了。不过我觉得咱们还是得去重庆拍一次外景。
en: I have. But I still think we need to go to Chongqing for an outdoor shoot.

zh: 为什么？
en: Why?

zh: 因为那是我们故事开始的地方。
en: Because that's where our story started.

zh: ……你真是，什么时候都忘不了那个夏天。
en: ...Honestly. You never can forget that summer, can you.

zh: 当然忘不了。那个夏天我遇到了你，偷拍了一张照片，然后整个人生都变了。
en: Of course I can't. That summer I met you, snapped a secret photo — and my whole life flipped upside down.

zh: 我的也是。
en: Mine too.

zh: （握着合同，指节发白）好。我接受。
en: (gripping the contract, knuckles white) Fine. I accept.

zh: 好。后续会有专人来对接。
en: Good. Someone will follow up with you on the details.

zh: 林辰，我是不是做了一个很懦弱的选择？
en: Lin Chen... did I make a cowardly choice?

zh: 不。你做了一个很现实的选择。这没有错。
en: No. You made a practical choice. There's nothing wrong with that.

zh: 而且——不管品牌卖不卖，你还是你。
en: Besides — whether the brand sells or not, you're still you.

zh: 好久不见。
en: Long time no see.

zh: 大忙人，终于舍得约我出来了？
en: Well well, Mr. Busybody finally decided to ask me out, huh?

zh: 少来。我很想你。
en: Oh stop. I missed you.

zh: 林辰，虽然品牌卖了，但我们还在。
en: Lin Chen, yeah the brand is gone, but we're still here.

zh: 等这阵忙完，我们一起去南山看星星吧。就我们俩。
en: Once this busy stretch is over, let's go to Nanshan to watch the stars. Just the two of us.

zh: 好。我等你说这句话很久了。
en: Okay. I've been waiting ages for you to say that.

zh: 你说，如果当初我没有接受收购，我们会是什么样？
en: Hey... if I hadn't taken that buyout back then, where do you think we'd be?

zh: 大概会穷一点、累一点。但该在一起的，还是会在一起。
en: Probably poorer, more tired. But the ones meant to be together still end up together.

zh: 嘴这么甜，是不是又偷拍我了？
en: When'd you get so smooth? Did you take another sneaky shot of me?

zh: 我光明正大地拍。
en: I take them out in the open.

zh: 对不起，王总。我还是想再试试自己做。
en: Sorry, Mr. Wang. I still want to try going solo.

zh: 好吧。我尊重你的决定。
en: Alright. I respect your call.

zh: 我还以为你会接受。
en: I thought you would've taken it.

zh: 我也犹豫过。但是一想到要把「暗夜蔷薇」交给别人，我就舍不得。
en: I hesitated too. But the thought of handing 'Dark Night Rose' to someone else... I just couldn't let go.

zh: 不过……我现在还没有信心能把它做好。
en: Though... I still don't have the confidence to make it work.

zh: 等你毕业之后，我们一起努力。
en: After you graduate, we'll make it work together.

zh: 林辰！这里！
en: Lin Chen! Over here!

zh: 怎么了？这么急着找我。
en: What's up? You seemed pretty desperate to find me.

zh: 你看！这是上海漫展的门票。我们的品牌被邀请去参展了！
en: Look! These are tickets to the Shanghai Comic Convention — our brand got an invite!

zh: 真的吗？太好了！
en: Seriously? That's incredible!

zh: 是啊！我们终于可以去上海参展了！
en: Right?! We can finally go to Shanghai for the expo!

zh: 林辰，等这次上海漫展结束，我们就正式在一起吧。
en: Lin Chen... when the Shanghai convention is over, let's make it official.

zh: 嗯。这一年来，你一直陪在我身边，帮我解决了那么多问题。
en: Mm-hmm. This whole year, you've been right here with me, helping me through everything.

zh: 我现在有信心了。我可以做好品牌，也可以做好你的女朋友。
en: I've got confidence now. I can make the brand succeed — and I can be a good girlfriend too.

zh: 好。我等你。
en: Okay. I'll be waiting.

zh: 我走了！等我回来！
en: I'm off! Wait for me!

zh: 一路顺风！我等你回来！
en: Safe travels! I'll be right here when you get back.

zh: 好，我同意收购。
en: Alright. I agree to the acquisition.

zh: 安雅？
en: Anya?

zh: 我累了，林辰。
en: I'm tired, Lin Chen.

zh: 这一年来，我每天都在熬夜，每天都在担心品牌会倒闭。我真的撑不下去了。
en: This past year I've stayed up every single night, terrified the brand would collapse. I really can't do it anymore.

zh: 接受收购，我就不用再这么辛苦了。
en: If I take the buyout, I won't have to struggle like this anymore.

zh: 如果你已经决定了，我支持你。
en: If your mind's made up, I've got your back.

zh: 其实，我挺舍不得山城的。
en: You know... I'm really going to miss this city.

zh: 舍不得这里的火锅，舍不得这里的冰粉，也舍不得……你。
en: I'll miss the hotpot here, I'll miss the ice jelly... and I'll miss you.

zh: 到了上海，要好好照顾自己。
en: Take good care of yourself when you get to Shanghai.

zh: 嗯。你也是。要好好吃饭，别总是熬夜。
en: Mm-hmm. You too. Eat proper meals, and stop staying up so late.

zh: 这个给你。
en: Here. This is for you.

zh: 这是我专门为你设计的。情侣款。
en: I designed this just for you. Matching couple's set.

zh: 本来想等发布会结束后送给你的。现在……就当是离别礼物吧。
en: I was gonna give it to you after the launch event. But now... think of it as a parting gift.

zh: 林辰，对不起。
en: Lin Chen... I'm sorry.

zh: 不用说对不起。我理解你。
en: No need to apologize. I understand.

zh: 我会想你的。
en: I'm gonna miss you.

zh: 如果……如果以后我回来了，你还会等我吗？
en: If... if I come back someday, will you still wait for me?

zh: 会的。我会一直等你。
en: I will. I'll always wait for you.

zh: 再见了，安雅。
en: Goodbye, Anya.

zh: 再见了，那个属于我们的夏天。
en: Goodbye, that summer that was ours.

zh: 原来你就是设计师！难怪气质这么特别，和那些只会穿衣服的完全不一样。
en: So you're the designer! No wonder you've got such a unique vibe — totally unlike those girls who just wear the stuff.

zh: 啊、啊我不是故意的！主要是你长得太好看了，我一时看呆了才拍照的……
en: Ah — ah, I didn't mean to! It's just... you're so stunning I kinda spaced out and took the shot before I knew it...

zh: 你胡说什么呢。
en: What are you even babbling about.

zh: 以后有什么事，都可以告诉我。不用一个人硬撑着。
en: From now on, whatever's bothering you, just tell me. You don't have to tough it out alone.

zh: 这……这是粥？
en: Is this... porridge?

zh: 好吃。
en: It's good.

zh: 不用不用！太麻烦你了！
en: No no, I couldn't! That's way too much trouble!

zh: 这几个月你熬了多少个通宵，为的不就是今天吗？
en: All those all-nighters you pulled the past few months — isn't this the day you were working toward?
